name: Frangelico Chocolate Cake with Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Separate eggs.
4. Beat egg whites until frothy; then beat in sugar until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
5. Cream butter and brown sugar until fluffy.
6. Beat in yolks one at a time.
7. Sift flour, cocoa, baking soda together.
8. Add to creamed mixture alternately with coffee and Frangelico; blend well.
9. Fold egg whites into batter.
10. Pour into prepared pans.
11. Bake 30-35 minutes or until done.
12. Cool for 10 minutes.
13. Invert cakes on wire racks and remove pans.
14. Frosting: Cream butter with sugar.
15. Add all remaining ingredients and beat until smooth.
